backend/main.mo: Main backend actor implementing manga reading platform with user profiles, manga/chapter management, bookmarks, reading history, and admin controls using access control and blob storage mixins.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report mapping implemented features (authentication, home page, manga details, reader, dark mode) to their source files, components, and test IDs with confidence levels.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Comprehensive summaries of all frontend TypeScript/React components, pages, and hooks describing their functionality and integration with routing, authentication, and backend queries.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors including background, foreground, primary, secondary, accent, and sidebar styling.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point for the manga reading web application with root div and module script reference to main.tsx.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root application component configuring TanStack Router with routes for home, manga details, reader, bookmarks, history, and admin pages, wrapped with theme provider and protected route components.
frontend/src/components/AccessDeniedScre: Access denied alert component displayed to non-admin users attempting to access admin routes with a return to home button.
frontend/src/components/AddChapterForm.t: Admin form component for adding chapters to existing manga with manga selector, chapter title input, and multi-line image URL textarea with validation and toast notifications.
frontend/src/components/AddMangaForm.tsx: Form component for adding new manga entries with title, description, and cover image URL fields. Uses useAddManga hook and displays toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/components/AdminRoute.tsx: Route guard component that checks if user is authenticated and has admin privileges. Shows loading spinner during checks and AccessDeniedScreen if unauthorized.
frontend/src/components/BookmarkButton.t: Toggle button component for adding/removing manga bookmarks. Displays different icons based on bookmark state and uses useAddBookmark/useRemoveBookmark hooks.
frontend/src/components/ChapterList.tsx: Displays a sorted list of manga chapters as clickable cards. Each card links to the chapter reader page with chapter number and title.
frontend/src/components/HistoryCard.tsx: Card component showing manga reading history with cover image, title, last read chapter, and continue reading button. Links to both manga detail and chapter pages.
frontend/src/components/Layout.tsx: Main layout wrapper with sticky header navigation (Home, Bookmarks, History, Admin), theme toggle, login button, and footer. Shows admin link conditionally based on user role.
frontend/src/components/LoginButton.tsx: Authentication button that toggles between login/logout states using Internet Identity. Handles login errors and clears query cache on logout.
frontend/src/components/MangaCard.tsx: Card component displaying manga cover image, title, description, and read button. Features hover effects and links to manga detail page.
frontend/src/components/Pagination.tsx: Pagination controls with previous/next buttons and numbered page buttons. Shows ellipsis for large page ranges and highlights current page.
frontend/src/components/ProtectedRoute.t: Route guard that requires authentication to access content. Shows loading spinner during initialization and login prompt for unauthenticated users.
frontend/src/components/SearchBar.tsx: Search input component with debounced search (300ms delay) and clear button. Includes search icon and triggers onSearch callback on input changes.
frontend/src/components/ThemeToggle.tsx: Button component that toggles between light and dark themes using next-themes. Displays sun/moon icons with smooth rotation transitions.
frontend/src/components/UserProfileSetup: Modal dialog component that prompts authenticated users without a profile to create one by entering username and email. Uses form validation and displays toast notifications on success/error.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: React Query hook that creates and manages the backend actor instance, handling both authenticated and anonymous actors. Invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes due to identity updates.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddBookmark.ts: Mutation hook for adding a manga bookmark that invalidates the bookmarks query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddChapter.ts: Mutation hook for adding a chapter to a manga with title and images, invalidating manga and manga list queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useAddManga.ts: Mutation hook for creating a new manga with title, description, and cover image, invalidating manga list queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetAllManga.ts: Query hook that fetches all manga by paginating through getMangaList until no more results are returned.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetBookmarks.ts: Query hook that fetches the current user's bookmarked manga list from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetCallerUserProfi: Query hook that fetches the current authenticated user's profile, returning null if no profile exists. Includes combined loading state from actor and query.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMangaById.ts: Query hook that fetches a single manga by its ID from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useGetMangaList.ts: Query hook that fetches a paginated list of manga for a specific page number.
Query hook that fetches the current user's reading history from the backend.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Context provider and hook for Internet Identity authentication, managing login state, identity persistence, and delegation validation. Provides login, logout, and status tracking functionality.
frontend/src/hooks/useIsCallerAdmin.ts: Query hook that checks if the current authenticated user has admin privileges.
frontend/src/hooks/useRecordReadingHisto: Mutation hook for recording a user's reading progress (manga ID and chapter number), invalidating reading history queries on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useRemoveBookmark.ts: Mutation hook for removing a manga bookmark that invalidates the bookmarks query cache on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSaveCallerUserProf: Mutation hook for saving/updating the current user's profile, invalidating the user profile query on success.
frontend/src/hooks/useSearchManga.ts: Query hook that searches manga by term, only executing when the search term is non-empty.
frontend/src/index.css: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom CSS variables for light and dark theme colors, including primary, secondary, accent, and chart colors using OKLCH color space.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that sets up React Query client and Internet Identity provider, then renders the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin panel page displaying forms for adding new manga and chapters in a two-column grid layout.
frontend/src/pages/BookmarksPage.tsx: Page displaying the user's bookmarked manga in a responsive grid, with loading state and empty state handling.
frontend/src/pages/HistoryPage.tsx: Page displaying the user's reading history sorted by timestamp, combining history entries with manga data and showing the last chapter read for each manga.
frontend/src/pages/HomePage.tsx: Home page component that displays a grid of manga cards with search functionality, pagination, and loading states. Uses hooks for fetching manga list and search results, showing 12 items per page.
frontend/src/pages/MangaDetailsPage.tsx: Manga details page that displays cover image, title, description, bookmark button, and chapter list for a specific manga. Fetches manga data by ID from URL params and handles loading/error states.
frontend/src/pages/ReaderPage.tsx: Chapter reader page with vertical scroll layout displaying manga pages, navigation controls for previous/next chapters, and automatic reading history recording. Includes sticky header with manga/chapter info and navigation buttons.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for extracting and managing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routing, with sessionStorage persistence support. Includes functions to get, store, clear, and persist parameters across navigation.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration with custom theme extensions including OKLCH color system, container settings, border radius variables, custom animations (accordion), and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project metadata defining a manga reading web app with React/Vite frontend, Motoko backend on Internet Computer, Internet Identity authentication, dark anime theme, and listing existing features like authentication, manga browsing, reader, bookmarks, and admin panel.
